title: Laz Viewer for BTE
description: This mods adds a simple overlay to see LIDAR scans in the Build The Earth project
body:
# LazViewer !
## Description

This mods adds a simple overlay that shows .laz files on the BTE server

## How to use

The mod will create a folder called /lidar, just drag & drop .laz files in this folder.
In game, just press U and it will open a menu to choose a .laz file, load one, and enjoy

/!\ This mod loads millions of point into your game, it can get laggy on low-end configurations, edit the graphical settings accordingly in the mod GUI.
